'Notify Assignees' ActionPRO
Messenger
SMS
Email
Mobile push notification
Telegram 

Enable to let Manychat send you notifications when a contact performs a specific action in your broadcasts, welcome messages, opt-in messages, etc.

Download Manychat application to receive push notifications and stay informed.

Inbox Desktop Notifications
Notify me when
I get a new message from a conversation assigned to me
There is a new conversation in unassigned folder
A conversation is assigned to me
Enable instant popup notifications on your desktop about new messages and assigned conversations. If you don't see the notifications, check your system settings if notifications are on.
Inbox Channel Notifications
Notify me when
A conversation is assigned to me
Inbox notifications help you support your audience and track leads across the connected channels below, like Email, SMS, and Telegram.
My Telegram for Notifications
Subscribe With Telegram
Opt-in to our bot to be able to receive bot notifications in Telegram
My Email for Notifications
Update
My Phone Number for Notifications
Save
I confirm that the phone number is owned by me and I give permission to send me SMS notifications.
Add your phone number to receive SMS notifications. Please note that you will be charged for every SMS notification.

Inbox Behavior
Any message starts a conversation
Conversation should be opened explicitly
Open a new chat in Inbox with any message from a contact and mark it “Unassigned”. This setting excludes automated conversations located in the “Closed” folder.
Close all assigned conversations
Close All
Pause automations during conversations
30 minutes
During a chat conversation with an Inbox Agent, all Automations associated with a contact will be temporarily paused for a selected duration.
Re-opened conversations
Assign to the same agent
When contact re-opens a closed conversation you can assign it to the same agent that previously worked on it. Either way conversation will be moved to the Unassigned folder.
Conversations visibility
Grant access to all conversations for all Agents
Disable this option, if you want Inbox agents to have access only to new conversations and conversations that are assigned to them.
Sound notifications
Allow In-app sound alerts
Canned Response
+ New Canned Response
No Canned Responses

Auto-Assignment
Upgrade your plan to enable

Use Auto-Assignment to distribute conversations among agents. System automatically assigns chats to team members. Go to the team member’s profile to set up their conversations limits.
Learn more

Off
Team members pick conversations manually from Unassigned folder.
Basic
Distribute conversations among all your available team members.
UPGRADE
Upgrade required: This feature requires upgrading your plan to access.
Advanced
Assign conversations to Groups or team members with Rules.
UPGRADE
Upgrade required: This feature requires upgrading your plan to access.

Instagram
@carry.digital.nomad
Default Reply
Send
Instagram Default Reply
The Default Reply is triggered when your contact types something your bot cannot recognize, like if you haven’t set up a Keyword. We recommend setting it up to welcome new contacts, give them more information, and give them a way to nagivate their conversation, in case they get lost.
Main Menu
Edit
The Main Menu is the “hamburger” menu located at the top right corner of Direct Messages. It can be opened at any time by your contacts. Customize it to give your contacts an easy way to navigate your bot.
Say hi to new followersBETA
Unavailable yet
Meta limited the use of this functionality.
Get more info
A one-time welcome DM sent through Meta’s official API to new Instagram followers the moment they hit follow, but only the first time they do.
Conversation Starters
Edit
Conversation Starters provide a way for users to start a conversation with a business with a list of frequently asked questions or discussion topics.
Opt-in Automation
Edit
Opt-In triggers the automation when the user types "Start" or "Subscribe" in your Instagram channel. These system keywords are by default and aren't editable.
Opt-out Automation
Edit
Opt-out triggers the automation when the user types "Stop" or "Unsubscribe" in your Instagram channel. These system keywords are by default and aren't editable.
Story Mention Reply
Create New Reply
Select Existing
Start an automation, like a message or Manychat Action, if someone mentions your Instagram account in their Story.
Ads Optimization
Meta Conversions API
Connect
The Conversions API is a Meta Business Tool that allows you to share data with Meta to enhance the performance of ads.
Learn More
Open Event Manager
Refresh Instagram Permissions
Refresh Permissions
Instagram can unexpectedly lose the connection to your page permissions. If you encounter any trouble, like content not sending or setting not saving, always refresh your permissions first.
Disable Instagram Channel
Disable
You can temporary disable Instagram Channel if you want to stop your automation. It can be enabled again later.
Learn More
Remove Instagram Account from Manychat
Remove
You can completely remove Instagram account from Manychat if you want to connect another page or disable Instagram channel. Note: all your Instagram subscribers will be deleted from Manychat.

Stripe Account
Connect Stripe Account
You can accept payments via Messenger and Instagram. You need to connect an existing Stripe account or create a new one to access Buy Button in your Automations. Buy Button can be used with Card, Gallery, List or Media Template elements. Learn more
PayPal Account
How can I find needed Client ID and Webhook ID?
Connect PayPal Account
You can accept PayPal payments via Messenger and Instagram. You need to connect an existing PayPal Business account to access Buy Button in your Automation.
